title: Tool Wear Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost of tool wear per part, including replacement, downtime, rework, and quality losses, based on industrial engineering standards (ISO 8688, Lean, Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Tool Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price of a single cutting tool or insert.

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase price of a single cutting tool or insert.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir kesici takımın veya insertin satın alma fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kaufpreis eines einzelnen Schneidwerkzeugs oder Wendeschneidplatte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix d'achat d'un seul outil de coupe ou plaquette.

inputs.label: Tool Life (Parts per Tool)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of parts produced before tool replacement is required.

label_i18n.fr: Durée de vie de l'outil (pièces par outil)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of parts produced before tool replacement is required.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takım değişimi gerekmeden önce üretilen ortalama parça sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl gefertigter Teile vor erforderlichem Werkzeugwechsel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de pièces produites avant remplacement de l'outil.

inputs.label: Replacement Time
inputs.businessContext: Time required to replace or index the tool.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to replace or index the tool.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takımı değiştirmek veya indekslemek için gereken süre.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps nécessaire pour remplacer ou indexer l'outil.

inputs.label: Machine Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened cost per hour of machine operation (including labor, overhead, depreciation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened cost per hour of machine operation (including labor, overhead, depreciation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makine çalışmasının saat başına tam yüklenmiş maliyeti (işçilik, genel giderler, amortisman dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belasteter Stundensatz des Maschinenbetriebs (inkl. Lohn, Gemeinkosten, Abschreibung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût complet par heure de fonctionnement machine (incluant main-d'œuvre, frais généraux, amortissement).

inputs.label: Rework Rate due to Wear
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of parts requiring rework due to tool wear, based on Six Sigma defect tracking.

label_i18n.fr: Taux de reprise dû à l'usure

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of parts requiring rework due to tool wear, based on Six Sigma defect tracking.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altı Sigma kusur takibine dayalı olarak takım aşınması nedeniyle yeniden işleme gerektiren parçaların yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Teile, die aufgrund von Werkzeugverschleiß nachbearbeitet werden müssen, basierend auf Six Sigma Fehlerverfolgung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de pièces nécessitant une reprise en raison de l'usure de l'outil, basé sur le suivi des défauts Six Sigma.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Part
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to rework a defective part (material, labor, overhead).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost to rework a defective part (material, labor, overhead).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı bir parçayı yeniden işlemenin ortalama maliyeti (malzeme, işçilik, genel giderler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten zur Nacharbeit eines fehlerhaften Teils (Material, Lohn, Gemeinkosten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pour reprendre une pièce défectueuse (matière, main-d'œuvre, frais généraux).

inputs.label: Scrap Rate due to Wear
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of parts scrapped due to tool wear beyond tolerance.

label_i18n.fr: Taux de rebut dû à l'usure

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of parts scrapped due to tool wear beyond tolerance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tolerans dışı takım aşınması nedeniyle hurdaya ayrılan parçaların yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Teile, die aufgrund von Werkzeugverschleiß außerhalb der Toleranz verschrottet werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de pièces mises au rebut en raison d'une usure de l'outil hors tolérance.

inputs.label: Scrap Material Cost per Part
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw material lost per scrapped part.

label_i18n.fr: Coût matière du rebut par pièce

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw material lost per scrapped part.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hurdaya ayrılan parça başına kaybedilen hammadde maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten des verlorenen Rohmaterials pro verschrottetem Teil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de la matière première perdue par pièce mise au rebut.

rules.message: Tool life must be at least 1 part.

thresholds.alert: Tool wear cost per part exceeds $2.00. Investigate tool life or replacement process.
Scrap rate due to wear exceeds 5%. Immediate process review required.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
